tasks_completed.changes: Added blank line separator and two lines: comment '# Local Claude settings (machine-specific, not for version control)' and pattern '.claude/settings.local.json'
tasks_completed.rationale: File exists on disk but is not tracked; adding to .gitignore prevents future accidental tracking. Root cause: .gitignore had .claude/workflow-current.json but no entry for settings.local.json, a machine-specific settings file that should never be versioned.

git_rationale.root_cause_commit: N/A - multiple historical commits across repos
git_rationale.why_issue_occurred: .gitignore for excel-analyzer was missing a pattern for .claude/settings.local.json; the file is machine-specific and should not be versioned
git_rationale.how_fix_addresses_root: Adding .claude/settings.local.json to .gitignore prevents future accidental staging and tracking of this machine-local settings file

dev.qa_notes: Verify: (1) git check-ignore -v .claude/settings.local.json in /root/excel-analyzer returns exit code 0 with .gitignore:44 as source. (2) git ls-files .claude/settings.local.json returns empty output.

self_verification.notes: git check-ignore -v .claude/settings.local.json returned '.gitignore:44:.claude/settings.local.json .claude/settings.local.json' confirming the pattern is active. git ls-files .claude/settings.local.json returned empty confirming file is not tracked.

recommendations: Consider adding .claude/workflow-*.json (wildcard) instead of only .claude/workflow-current.json to catch all UUID-named workflow files, consistent with the pattern used in other repos
